message:
feat: add WebSocket event log persistence for replay durability

Introduces persistent storage for WebSocket messages to enable reliable
replay when in-memory ring buffer expires or has gaps.

Schema changes:
- Add ws_event_log table with channel, cursor, cursor_timestamp,
  cursor_sequence, message blob, and created_at columns
- Compound index on (channel, cursor_timestamp, cursor_sequence) for
  efficient range queries during replay
- Index on created_at for TTL-based cleanup

WebSocket handler changes:
- Detect expired/empty in-memory replay results
- Fall back to database replay via WsEventLogService
- Throttle concurrent replay requests (MAX_CONCURRENT_REPLAYS_PER_CONNECTION=2)
- Send throttled message with resumeAfterMs when limit exceeded
- Track activeReplays counter per connection in hub

New service:
- WsEventLogService handles DB-backed message persistence and replay
- Configurable via WS_EVENT_LOG_ENABLED environment variable

This ensures clients can recover missed messages even after server
restarts or when cursor refers to evicted ring buffer entries.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,12 @@
+CREATE TABLE `ws_event_log` (
+	`id` text PRIMARY KEY NOT NULL,
+	`channel` text NOT NULL,
+	`cursor` text NOT NULL,
+	`cursor_timestamp` integer NOT NULL,
+	`cursor_sequence` integer NOT NULL,
+	`message` blob NOT NULL,
+	`created_at` integer NOT NULL
+);
+--> statement-breakpoint
+CREATE INDEX `ws_event_log_channel_cursor_idx` ON `ws_event_log` (`channel`,`cursor_timestamp`,`cursor_sequence`);--> statement-breakpoint
+CREATE INDEX `ws_event_log_created_at_idx` ON `ws_event_log` (`created_at`);
\ No newline at end of file

@@ -79,6 +79,27 @@ export const history = sqliteTable(
   ],
 );
 
+export const wsEventLog = sqliteTable(
+  "ws_event_log",
+  {
+    id: text("id").primaryKey(),
+    channel: text("channel").notNull(),
+    cursor: text("cursor").notNull(),
+    cursorTimestamp: integer("cursor_timestamp").notNull(),
+    cursorSequence: integer("cursor_sequence").notNull(),
+    message: blob("message", { mode: "json" }).notNull(),
+    createdAt: integer("created_at", { mode: "timestamp" }).notNull(),
+  },
+  (table) => [
+    index("ws_event_log_channel_cursor_idx").on(
+      table.channel,
+      table.cursorTimestamp,
+      table.cursorSequence,
+    ),
+    index("ws_event_log_created_at_idx").on(table.createdAt),
+  ],
+);
+
 export const alerts = sqliteTable(
   "alerts",
   {

@@ -20,6 +20,7 @@ export type AuditAction =
   | "agent.send"
   | "session.create"
   | "session.restore"
+  | "ws.replay"
   | "auth.login"
   | "auth.logout"
   | "auth.token_refresh"
@@ -42,6 +43,7 @@ export type ResourceType =
   | "agent"
   | "session"
   | "checkpoint"
+  | "ws_channel"
   | "api_key"
   | "user"
   | "account"
